resumeAnalysis.candidateSummary: Computer science student with practical full-stack development experience using React, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT authentication, and AI API integration.

recommendedRoles.whyThisRoleFits: Resume includes frontend, backend, database, authentication, and AI API project work.
Candidate has REST API and authentication experience.

jobRecommendations.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
whyFits: Strong match with React, Express.js, MongoDB, and API integration.
Project experience shows ability to build complete web applications.
jobRecommendations.suggestedApplicationAction: Add GitHub link, live demo link, and short project impact metrics before applying.

adaptiveInterviewExample.question: In your Travel Planner project, how does the frontend send user preferences to the backend and how is the generated plan saved?
adaptiveInterviewExample.reason: The resume shows a full-stack project, so the first question validates project understanding.

adaptiveInterviewExample.candidateSignal: Candidate gave a short answer with low depth score and several pauses.
adaptiveInterviewExample.nextQuestion: Let's go step by step. What is an API route, and why does your frontend need one to talk to the backend?
adaptiveInterviewExample.reason: The agent reduced difficulty because confidence and knowledge depth were low.

feedback.technical: Good practical understanding of React and Express. Improve explanation of authentication flow and database design.
feedback.communication: Answer was understandable, but should be structured using problem, approach, implementation, and result.
feedback.confidence: Confidence is moderate. Reduce filler words and avoid long pauses before technical terms.
feedback.visual: Good engagement overall. Maintain steady eye contact during longer answers.
practicePlan: Practice explaining one system design diagram.
Record one mock interview and reduce fillers.
